lines.english: Lesson 39
lines.chinese: 第39课
lines.raw: Lesson 39 | 第39课

lines.english: What every writer wants
lines.chinese: 每个作家都想要什么
lines.raw: What every writer wants | 每个作家都想要什么

lines.english: How do professional writers ignore what they were taught at school about writing?
lines.chinese: 职业作家是如何摆脱学校里所学到的写作知识的？
lines.raw: How do professional writers ignore what they were taught at school about writing? | 职业作家是如何摆脱学校里所学到的写作知识的？

lines.english: I have known very few writers,
lines.chinese: 我认识的作家很少，
lines.raw: I have known very few writers, | 我认识的作家很少，

lines.english: but those I have known and whom I respect, confess at once that they have little idea where they are going when they first set pen to paper.
lines.chinese: 但我所认识和尊重的那几位作家，都立刻承认他们在首次提笔写作时，对要写什么几乎没有什么概念。
lines.raw: but those I have known and whom I respect, confess at once that they have little idea where they are going when they first set pen to paper. | 但我所认识和尊重的那几位作家，都立刻承认他们在首次提笔写作时，对要写什么几乎没有什么概念。

lines.english: They have a character, perhaps two;
lines.chinese: 他们可能有一个人物，或许两个；
lines.raw: They have a character, perhaps two; | 他们可能有一个人物，或许两个；

lines.english: they are in that condition of eager discomfort which passes for inspiration all admit radical changes of destination once the journey has begun;
lines.chinese: 他们处于那种急切不安的状态，那种状态被认为是灵感，一旦旅程开始，所有人都承认目的地会发生根本性变化；
lines.raw: they are in that condition of eager discomfort which passes for inspiration all admit radical changes of destination once the journey has begun; | 他们处于那种急切不安的状态，那种状态被认为是灵感，一旦旅程开始，所有人都承认目的地会发生根本性变化；

lines.english: one, to my certain knowledge, spent nine months on a novel about Kashmir,
lines.chinese: 据我所知，有一位作家花九个月写了一部关于克什米尔的小说，
lines.raw: one, to my certain knowledge, spent nine months on a novel about Kashmir, | 据我所知，有一位作家花九个月写了一部关于克什米尔的小说，

lines.english: then reset the whole thing in the Scottish Highlands.
lines.chinese: 然后将整个故事背景改到了苏格兰高地。
lines.raw: then reset the whole thing in the Scottish Highlands. | 然后将整个故事背景改到了苏格兰高地。

lines.english: I never heard of anyone making a 'skeleton', as we were taught at school.
lines.chinese: 我从未听说有人像我们在学校里学的那样，先写好“提纲”。
lines.raw: I never heard of anyone making a 'skeleton', as we were taught at school. | 我从未听说有人像我们在学校里学的那样，先写好“提纲”。

lines.english: In the breaking and remaking, in the timing interweaving, beginning afresh,
lines.chinese: 在打破与重塑、适时交织、重新开始的过程中，
lines.raw: In the breaking and remaking, in the timing interweaving, beginning afresh, | 在打破与重塑、适时交织、重新开始的过程中，

lines.english: the writer comes to discern things in his material which were not consciously in his mind when he began.
lines.chinese: 作家开始辨明他材料中那些在开始时并未意识到的东西。
lines.raw: the writer comes to discern things in his material which were not consciously in his mind when he began. | 作家开始辨明他材料中那些在开始时并未意识到的东西。

lines.english: This organic process, often leading to moments of extraordinary self-discovery, is of an indescribable fascination.
lines.chinese: 这种有机过程，常常带来非凡的自我发现时刻，具有难以言喻的魅力。
lines.raw: This organic process, often leading to moments of extraordinary self-discovery, is of an indescribable fascination. | 这种有机过程，常常带来非凡的自我发现时刻，具有难以言喻的魅力。

lines.english: A blurred image appears; he adds a brushstroke and another and it is gone
lines.chinese: 一个模糊的图像出现了；他添上一笔又一笔，然后它消失了，
lines.raw: A blurred image appears; he adds a brushstroke and another and it is gone | 一个模糊的图像出现了；他添上一笔又一笔，然后它消失了，

lines.english: but something was there, and he will not rest till he has captured it.
lines.chinese: 但有些东西曾在那儿，他不会停歇直到捕捉到它。
lines.raw: but something was there, and he will not rest till he has captured it. | 但有些东西曾在那儿，他不会停歇直到捕捉到它。

lines.english: Sometimes the yeast within a writer outlives a book he has written.
lines.chinese: 有时，作家内心的“酵母”比他写的一本书活得更久。
lines.raw: Sometimes the yeast within a writer outlives a book he has written. | 有时，作家内心的“酵母”比他写的一本书活得更久。

lines.english: I have heard of writers who read nothing but their own books;
lines.chinese: 我听说过有些作家除了自己的书什么都不读；
lines.raw: I have heard of writers who read nothing but their own books; | 我听说过有些作家除了自己的书什么都不读；

lines.english: like adolescents they stand before the mirror,
lines.chinese: 他们像青少年一样站在镜子前，
lines.raw: like adolescents they stand before the mirror, | 他们像青少年一样站在镜子前，

lines.english: and still cannot fathom the exact outline of the vision before them.
lines.chinese: 却仍然无法完全理解眼前景象的精确轮廓。
lines.raw: and still cannot fathom the exact outline of the vision before them. | 却仍然无法完全理解眼前景象的精确轮廓。

lines.english: For the same reason, writers talk interminably about their own books,
lines.chinese: 出于同样的原因，作家们滔滔不绝地谈论自己的书，
lines.raw: For the same reason, writers talk interminably about their own books, | 出于同样的原因，作家们滔滔不绝地谈论自己的书，

lines.english: winkling out hidden meanings, super-imposing new ones,
lines.chinese: 挖掘隐藏的意义，叠加新的意义，
lines.raw: winkling out hidden meanings, super-imposing new ones, | 挖掘隐藏的意义，叠加新的意义，

lines.english: begging response from those around them.
lines.chinese: 乞求周围人的回应。
lines.raw: begging response from those around them. | 乞求周围人的回应。

lines.english: Of course a writer doing this is misunderstood: he might as well try to explain a crime or a love affair.
lines.chinese: 当然，这样做会使作家被误解：他倒不如去解释一起犯罪或一段恋情。
lines.raw: Of course a writer doing this is misunderstood: he might as well try to explain a crime or a love affair. | 当然，这样做会使作家被误解：他倒不如去解释一起犯罪或一段恋情。

lines.english: He is also, incidentally, an unforgivable bore.
lines.chinese: 顺便说一句，他也是一个不可原谅的无聊之人。
lines.raw: He is also, incidentally, an unforgivable bore. | 顺便说一句，他也是一个不可原谅的无聊之人。

lines.english: This temptation to cover the distance between himself and the reader,
lines.chinese: 这种弥合自己与读者之间距离的诱惑，
lines.raw: This temptation to cover the distance between himself and the reader, | 这种弥合自己与读者之间距离的诱惑，

lines.english: to study his image in the sight of those who do not know him, can be his undoing: he has begun to write to please.
lines.chinese: 在不认识他的人眼中审视自己的形象，可能会导致他的失败：他已经开始为了取悦他人而写作。
lines.raw: to study his image in the sight of those who do not know him, can be his undoing: he has begun to write to please. | 在不认识他的人眼中审视自己的形象，可能会导致他的失败：他已经开始为了取悦他人而写作。

lines.english: A young English writer made the pertinent observation a year or two back
lines.chinese: 一两年前，一位年轻的英国作家发表了中肯的评论，
lines.raw: A young English writer made the pertinent observation a year or two back | 一两年前，一位年轻的英国作家发表了中肯的评论，

lines.english: that the talent goes into the first draft, and the art into the drafts that follow.
lines.chinese: 才能体现在初稿中，而艺术则体现在后续的草稿中。
lines.raw: that the talent goes into the first draft, and the art into the drafts that follow. | 才能体现在初稿中，而艺术则体现在后续的草稿中。

lines.english: For this reason also the writer, like any other artist,
lines.chinese: 也正是因为这个原因，作家，像其他任何艺术家一样，
lines.raw: For this reason also the writer, like any other artist, | 也正是因为这个原因，作家，像其他任何艺术家一样，

lines.english: has no resting place, no crowd or movement in which he may take comfort,
lines.chinese: 没有安身之所，没有可以从中寻求慰藉的人群或运动，
lines.raw: has no resting place, no crowd or movement in which he may take comfort, | 没有安身之所，没有可以从中寻求慰藉的人群或运动，

lines.english: no judgment from outside which can replace the judgment from within.
lines.chinese: 没有外部的评判能够取代其内在的评判。
lines.raw: no judgment from outside which can replace the judgment from within. | 没有外部的评判能够取代其内在的评判。

lines.english: A writer makes order out of the anarchy of his heart;
lines.chinese: 作家从内心无序的状态中创造出秩序；
lines.raw: A writer makes order out of the anarchy of his heart; | 作家从内心无序的状态中创造出秩序；

lines.english: he submits himself to a more ruthless discipline than any critic dreamed of,
lines.chinese: 他让自己服从于一种比任何评论家所梦想的都更无情的纪律，
lines.raw: he submits himself to a more ruthless discipline than any critic dreamed of, | 他让自己服从于一种比任何评论家所梦想的都更无情的纪律，

lines.english: and when he flirts with fame, he is taking time off from living with himself,
lines.chinese: 当他追逐名利时，他是在从与自我共处中抽身，
lines.raw: and when he flirts with fame, he is taking time off from living with himself, | 当他追逐名利时，他是在从与自我共处中抽身，

lines.english: from the search for what his world contains at its inmost point.
lines.chinese: 从寻找他世界最深处包含的东西中抽身。
lines.raw: from the search for what his world contains at its inmost point. | 从寻找他世界最深处包含的东西中抽身。
